channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [UNIVAFOODS] Univa Foods Ltd Closes Trading Window for Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Univa Foods Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all insiders, designated persons, their immediate relatives, connected persons, fiduciaries, and intermediaries. This closure is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Company's Code of Conduct for the Prevention of Insider Trading in Securities. The trading window will remain closed from 1st April, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of the audited standalone financial results for the quarter and year ending 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board of Directors' meeting for the declaration of these results will be intimated in due course.

  • Univa Foods Ltd closes trading window for all insiders and designated persons.
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI regulations and the Company's Code of Conduct.
  • Trading window to remain closed from 1st April, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results.
  • Results are for the quarter and year ending 31st March, 2026.
  • Date of Board of Directors' meeting for result declaration to be intimated later.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Univa Foods Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [NIMBSPROJ] Nimbus Projects Ltd Partner, Nimbus Propmart Private Ltd, to Sell Stakes to Company's Managing Director
item.description:
Nimbus Projects Limited and Nimbus Propmart Private Limited (NPPL) are partners in three partnership firms. NPPL, a group company and the other partner in the partnership firms, has decided to sell its partnership stakes to Mr. Bipin Agarwal, Managing Director and promoter of the Company. This will result in NPPL retiring from the partnership firms and Mr. Bipin Agarwal being inducted as a partner. The capital contribution held by the Company in these firms will remain unchanged. This transaction will not affect the control, management, or financial position of the Company.

  • Nimbus Projects Ltd and Nimbus Propmart Private Limited are partners in three firms.
  • Nimbus Propmart Private Limited to sell its stakes to Nimbus Projects Ltd's Managing Director.
  • Mr. Bipin Agarwal to be inducted as a partner in place of Nimbus Propmart Private Limited.
  • Capital contribution of Nimbus Projects Ltd in these firms remains unchanged.
  • Transaction will not affect control, management, or financial position of the Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NIMBUS PROJECTS LTD. | Category: Partnership

item.title: [QUASAR] Quasar India Ltd Closes Trading Window Ahead of Q4 and FY26 Results
item.description:
Quasar India Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all Directors, Promoters, Designated Persons, and Insiders from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration and publication of Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Year ended on March 31, 2026. This decision is in accordance with Clause 4 of Schedule B of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Company's Code of Practices, Procedure and Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Insiders.

  • Quasar India Ltd closes trading window for Directors, Promoters, Designated Persons, and Insiders.
  • The closure is effective from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration and publication of Q4 and FY26 results.
  • This decision is in accordance with SEBI regulations and the company's code of conduct.
  • The trading window closure is a common practice ahead of financial results announcement.
  • The exact date of the results announcement was not provided in the document.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Quasar India Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [KOURA] Koura Fine Diamond Jewelry Ltd Changes Authorisation for Determining Materiality
item.description:
Koura Fine Diamond Jewelry Ltd has made changes in the authorisation for determining materiality and disclosure as per Regulation 30(5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The following Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) are now authorized to determine the materiality of an event or information and make disclosures to the Stock Exchanges: Kamlesh Keshavlal Lodhiya (Managing Director), Charmi Kamlesh Lodhiya (Whole-time Director & CFO), Soham Kamlesh Lodhiya (Whole-time Director), Anchal Surya Prakash Patwari (Company Secretary & Compliance Officer).

  • Koura Fine Diamond Jewelry Ltd has changed the authorisation for determining materiality and disclosure
  • The new KMP authorized to determine materiality and make disclosures are Kamlesh Keshavlal Lodhiya, Charmi Kamlesh Lodhiya, Soham Kamlesh Lodhiya, and Anchal Surya Prakash Patwari

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Koura Fine Diamond Jewelry Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [UCIL] Unifinz Capital India Ltd Declares Interim Dividend of 5% and Announces Non-Convertible Debenture Issue
item.description:
Unifinz Capital India Ltd has declared an interim dividend of 5% i.e., Rs. 0.50/- per equity share of Rs. 10/- each for the F.Y. 2025-26. The record date for the purpose of ascertaining the eligibility of shareholders for the payment of interim dividend has been fixed as Monday, April 06, 2026. Additionally, the company has approved the offer, issue, and allotment of non-convertible debentures up to INR 315,00,00,000 in one or more tranches on a private placement basis. The terms and conditions of the debenture issuance will be finalized by the Finance Committee of the Board of Directors.

  • Unifinz Capital India Ltd declares an interim dividend of 5%
  • The record date for dividend eligibility is fixed as April 06, 2026
  • The company to issue non-convertible debentures up to INR 315,00,00,000
  • Debenture issuance to be on a private placement basis
  • The Finance Committee will finalize the terms and conditions of the debenture issuance

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Unifinz Capital India Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [CDG] CDG Petchem Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window Until April 2026
item.description:
CDG Petchem Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons, including their immediate relatives, from Wednesday, April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading. All promoters, directors, key managerial personnel, designated persons, and their immediate relatives have been informed not to trade in the company's securities during this period. The date of the board meeting for the approval and publication of the audited financial results will be intimated in due course.

  • CDG Petchem Ltd announces closure of trading window until April 2026
  • Trading window closure is in accordance with SEBI regulations and the Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading
  • All promoters, directors, KMPs, designated persons, and their immediate relatives are advised not to trade during this period
  • The closure is to ensure fair trading practices during the announcement of audited financial results
  • The date of the board meeting for the approval and publication of the audited financial results will be announced later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CDG Petchem Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [UCIL] Unifinz Capital India Ltd Declares Interim Dividend of 5% and Announces Non-Convertible Debenture Issue
item.description:
Unifinz Capital India Ltd has declared an interim dividend of 5%, i.e., Rs. 0.50/- per equity share of Rs. 10/- each for the F.Y. 2025-26. The record date for the purpose of ascertaining the eligibility of shareholders for the payment of interim dividend is fixed as Monday, April 06, 2026. Additionally, the company has approved the offer, issue, and allotment of non-convertible debentures up to INR 315,00,00,000 in one or more tranches on a private placement basis. The terms and conditions of the proposed issuances will be finalised by the Finance Committee of the Board.

  • Unifinz Capital India Ltd declares an interim dividend of 5%
  • Record date for dividend eligibility fixed as April 06, 2026
  • Company to issue non-convertible debentures up to INR 315,00,00,000
  • Issuance to be on a private placement basis
  • Terms and conditions to be finalised by the Finance Committee

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Unifinz Capital India Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [RAMRAT] Ram Ratna Wires Ltd. Announces Capacity Expansion of 3,600 MT/Annum at Silvassa Units
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ram Ratna Wires Ltd. has announced a capacity addition and process enhancement at its existing manufacturing units located at Silvassa, Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu. The proposed capacity addition is 3,600 MT/Annum, which is to be added within 12 months i.e. by March, 2027. The investment required for this expansion is approximately Rs. 86 Crs, which will be financed through internal accruals or debt. The rationale behind this expansion is to meet the additional demand and enhance the process.

  • Ram Ratna Wires Ltd. to expand capacity by 3,600 MT/Annum
  • Expansion to be completed within 12 months i.e. by March, 2027
  • Investment required approximately Rs. 86 Crs
  • Financing to be done through internal accruals or debt
  • Expansion aimed at meeting additional demand and process enhancement

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAM RATNA WIRES LTD.-$ | Category: Expansion

item.title: [ARENTERP] Rajdarshan Industries Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Rajdarshan Industries Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Prohibition of Insider Trading Policy. The closure will be in effect from April 01, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The date of the board meeting for the declaration of these results will be announced separately. Connected Persons, Designated Persons, Directors, Promoters, and Promoter Group members are advised not to trade in the company's securities during this period.

  • Rajdarshan Industries Ltd closes trading window for Designated Persons and their immediate relatives.
  • Closure is in accordance with SEBI regulations and the company's Prohibition of Insider Trading Policy.
  • Closure will be in effect from April 01, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Date of board meeting for declaration of results to be announced separately.
  • Connected Persons, Designated Persons, Directors, Promoters, and Promoter Group members advised not to trade in the company's securities during this period.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAJDARSHAN INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PCJEWELLER] PC Jeweller Ltd Allots 20,09,70,560 Equity Shares on Conversion of Fully Convertible Warrants
item.description:
PC Jeweller Ltd has allotted 20,09,70,560 equity shares having a face value of ₹ 1/- each on conversion of 2,00,97,056 Fully Convertible Warrants ('Warrants') to four Allottees. The Warrants were allotted on a private placement basis to the persons belonging to 'Promoter Group' and 'Non-Promoter, Public Category'. The allotment was made after adjusting the number of shares, paid-up value per share and premium per share post sub-division / split of face value of equity shares of the Company from ₹ 10/- each to ₹ 1/- each. The newly allotted equity shares shall rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the Company. The allotment has resulted in an increase in the paid-up equity share capital of the Company from ₹ 836,85,87,325 to ₹ 856,95,57,885.

  • PC Jeweller Ltd allots 20,09,70,560 equity shares on conversion of Fully Convertible Warrants
  • Warrants were allotted to Promoter Group and Non-Promoter, Public Category
  • Allotment made after adjusting the number of shares, paid-up value per share and premium per share post sub-division / split
  • Newly allotted equity shares rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the Company
  • Paid-up equity share capital of the Company increases from ₹ 836,85,87,325 to ₹ 856,95,57,885

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PC JEWELLER LTD. | Category: Investment
